programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter comes home with the great news that he's been given his own column in the school newspaper. He quickly becomes popular with his classmates when they find their names in his newspaper column. This newfound popularity goes to Peter's head, however, as he tries to improve a poor grade in biology by flattering his teacher in the column.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Alice has decided to take a well deserved vacation, but feels like she's deserting the Brady family. She calls in her cousin, Emma to take her place and the Brady family is not prepared for Emma's military-styled approach.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie takes Howard to court after Fonzie's pigeon cage falls through the roof of his apartment during a blizzard. Fonzie claims the weight of the snow caused the roof to collapse while Howard claims it was the pigeon cage.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: After Shirley yells at Rhonda for wearing a coat made of animal fur, Laverne unknowingly sets Shirley up on a date with a furrier.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When former carnival man Jerry Miller becomes deputy to Sheriff Taylor, he finds himself jeopardizing Mayberry, making him question his decision to become a lawman.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive in Hollywood, Lucy goes to the Brown Derby restaurant where her sighting of actor William Holden turns catastrophic.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally's on-again off-again girlfriend, Julie Foster, seems to have thrown him over for a new guy in school who just happens to have a mustache. Wally's ego is bruised when Eddie tells him that Julie thinks he's naive and immature. This is the last straw and Wally decides to grow a mustache, much to the dismay of his family.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A friend has a car for sale and Wally is interested; however, Ward and June are, as usual, hesitant about the whole thing. Ward decides to give in to Wally and allow him to buy the used car, with the condition that he inspect it first. Ward quickly finds problems with the car and he helps Wally look elsewhere giving Wally tips on the process of used car shopping.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny needs to get around Beverly Hills and is having no luck with a driving lesson. When she hears that the Drysdale are looking at the horses, Granny decides she needs a trotter and buggy. Drysdale learns that the Clampetts want a horse, and after he learns of its potential winnings, the Clampetts acquire Ladybelle, a racehorse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny gets a buggy for her horse Ladybelle and gets the same thing for Mrs. Drysdale so they can have buggy races. But the horse she buys for her neighbor is known around the stables as "Old Gluepot." She tries to cheat to win, but ends up with Lightening, the poor horse, after Jed tries to teach her a lesson.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A famous big-game hunter lands on the island in search of new game to hunt.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: An loin-cloth-clad ape-man comes to the island, and makes off with their food and supplies.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and Bubba get a job at the same fast-food restaurant.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: An anonymous letter convinces Vint that he's adopted.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A young bachelor must marry within the week in order to claim a $3 million inheritance; meanwhile, a drab widow poses as a glamorous adventuress and captures the heart of the captain. Also, a confirmed male chauvinist angers his fiancee, who finds comfort in sick bay with Doc. And, a scandal sheet reporter sets out to compile material for a sins-at-sea story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Rose, the former housekeeper, gets married and Opie is unhappy at her departure. Aunt Bee comes to live with Andy and Opie, and Opie is not exactly thrilled with her.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.sub-title: Kevin Hermann- Movie Props And Costumes
programme.desc: "Driven by his “completist” mentality, Kevin Hermann has built an impressively vast collection of movie props and costumes from his favorite films - including one of the most complete costume collections from the hit franchise, Underworld. Kevin collects what he loves - from rare Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom props to the original puppets from the animated series, Gumby - and that love has turned into a hefty investment. In this episode of Collector’s Call, expert Mark Short places a seven-figure value on Kevin’s massive collection. With Kevin’s appetite for complete costumes - including the accessories - Mark comes prepared to trade two costumes and a prop from a popular television series in hopes of taking home one of Kevin’s more gruesome rarities. "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Billy Tyler, a young black sergeant, is brought into camp with a bullet wound in the leg. He is a football player, and when he discovers that his leg has been amputated, he wants to die. After talks with Radar, Billy agrees that he must live on.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Nurse Carrie Donovan receives a Dear Jane letter from her husband, and practically falls apart. B.J. consoles her, and they spend the night together. Feelings of guilt come over B.J. until he discusses them with Donovan and the air is cleared.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie refuses to let Edith's elderly aunt move into their spare bedroom, even after she's been turned away by every other relative.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is jealous when a lonely butcher lavishes attention on Edith.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Archie have a long talk after they find themself locked in the storeroom of Archie's Place.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria are sure the romance has gone out of their marriage when even a weekend in the Poconos fails to reignite the spark.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Wrong Number / Saturday Night / Recital, The / Vacuum Salesman
programme.desc: In Wrong Number, Carol questions a strange phone call for her husband. Then, in Saturday Night, Carol tries to get invited to a party next door. Next, in The Recital, four talentless musicians perform a showcase. Finally, in Vacuum Salesman, Tim has an emotional breakdown while trying to sell a vacuum.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests Tim Conway And Bernadette Peters
programme.desc: In As the Stomach Turns, Carol's sweet niece visits, only to discover she's possessed, in this parody of "The Exorcist". Then, in Two-Man Sub, two sailors must complete their mission: sink Cleveland.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob decides to do a program honoring great radio comedians.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura's past comes back to haunt her in form of a naked painting.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph tries to hit the high note on a civil service exam as well as his cornet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The residents of a small town are terrorized by a young boy who has the ability to read minds and make anything he wishes a reality.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: John Mitchell gets more than he bargained for when he offers a young man a new start in life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: King Selim of Qamadan, an American ally, has been secretly imprisoned by his brother, Prince Samandal, who controls the oil reserves and is brutalizing his people. The IMF must restore Selim to power.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: "After escaping the police in Nevada, Dr. Kimble comes upon Sister Veronica, who convinces him to accompany her on her trip to Sacramento despite his protests that he's heading in another direction."

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry Orwell joins forces with a woman whose search for her missing brother involves a dangerous assortment of characters -- and a half-million dollars in diamonds."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Luther King's assassination sends Friday and the Emergency Control Center into action.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives crack down on wildcatters—freelance tow-truck drivers who victimize motorists.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.sub-title: Log 71 -- I Feel Like A Fool, Malloy
programme.desc: It is a shift of conflicts forcing Malloy and Reed to use their wits to keep control and make the right decisions end on a low note.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy teases Reed about calculating the cost of a new house while their first baby is still six months away. In the meantime they settle a domestic dispute between arguing neighbors and help a taxi driver who was just robbed as well as a local man mistaken as the president by a group of rural Mexicans. Finally, they must arrest a psychotic shooter holed up in his house.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony travel to Wyoming for their Trekkin' All 50 tour of the United States."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: The social event of the season, according to Fred Rutherford, is a big party that a wealthy family is throwing and he rubs it in due to the fact that June and Ward didn't get an invitation. However, Wally and Eddie will be there after they get jobs parking the guest's cars. However, trouble ensues when Eddie parks Fred's car in a no parking spot and the car gets towed away by the city.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and Gilbert go to a carnival and Beaver surprisingly wins a fourteen caret gold locket in one of the carnival games. Beaver thinks about giving it to June but, thanks to Gilbert, decides to give it to a girl whom he has a crush on. However, soon it becomes apparent that this was a mistake when the girl's parents discover Beaver's gift.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Jealous Journalist
programme.desc: The drowning death of a newspaper executive during a fishing trip sets off all kinds of repercussions at the newspaper.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a woman who was planning to give her unborn baby to couple Howard and Amy has second thoughts and is soon found dead, the couple in question are the natural suspects. Matlock sets out to prove that someone else may have had a motive.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A night of revelry at a local pond turns deadly.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Zadok Walton visits the mountain. He seems eccentric, but turns out he is held in esteem by Boatwright University for his work

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt runs into his former mentor, Adam Kimbro, and decides to build his self-confidence by deputizing him as a deputy marshal.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After falling into a river, Adam is rescued by Tom Wilson. Wilson has feelings for Sue Miller, which bring him into trouble after her father is killed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Chris Hale is traveling to the Wyoming prison to pick up his brother Levi---who's about to be released from prison. Chris assumed Levi was pardoned but he was paroled to Chris. He must keep Levi out of Wyoming or he will be hanged."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The station enters the fireman's barber shop quartet contest. A man keeps requiring rescue while trying various ways to exercise. A woman overdoses on sleeping pills.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Father Mulcahy comes down with infectious hepatitis, and Hawkeye has to give the whole camp antibiotics, while dealing with a psychosomatic back pain. Meanwhile, B.J. has to perform a very difficult operation.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In the midst of Hawkeye being considered, much to his distaste, for the position of a general's personal physician, Radar becomes a surrogate father to a Korean woman and her baby, until the baby's GI father returns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: As a cure for the increased tension at the 4077th, Potter obtains a copy of his favorite film, "My Darling Clementine," and makes a social event out of it. As the film continues to break, tensions rise, until Mulcahy plays the piano, Radar does his impersonations and everyone acts out scenes from the film.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Korean children and American soldiers are often badly wounded when they hunt for souvenirs that the enemy have booby-trapped. Potter asks for it to stop, and Hawkeye and B.J. put a local junk dealer out of business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The state police arrogantly ask Andy and Barney to step aside while they search for an escaped convict in Mayberry, believing that the Mayberry sheriff's department is not capable of doing "real" police work.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jim Lindsey is a young guitarist that lives in Mayberry. When the famous musician Bobby Fleet and his band arrive in Mayberry, Andy and Barney scheme to arrest Bobby and his band so that Jim can get an audition.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finish dining with their Grunion, a surfer boy and a girl, and tell the captives they will let them go. Jethro wants to keep his captured girl, but Jed let’s the two go. At the bank, Drysdale, who tells Helen she must take the blame for his stupid mistakes, decides to get his former secretary back. Helen goes to the beach to try to get Jane back, and finds out the Clampetts still believe Grunion are people, a poor excuse, but people nonetheless.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is convinced he has been a goldbrick and stubbornly refuses to accept part of his paycheck. The Pentagon orders him to do so, but Gomer still refuses.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan arranges for a beautiful Russian spy to convince Klink that the Kommandant should volunteer for service at the Russian front. Hogan's payoff: some secret papers.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink is appointed defense counsel for a German officer on trial for treason who has secret plans intended for London. Hogan helps Klink prove the officer's innocence in order to secure the plans.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Vic Voyeur Show, Carol discovers her husband is cheating on her while listening to a radio program. Then, in The Thin Man, a parody on the hit series, the husband-wife detective duo search for a murder among dinner guests. Finally, in The Interrogator, a captured American solider meets the toughest interrogator yet -- a Hitler puppet.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Substitute Face
programme.desc: Mason and Della are traveling on a cruise ship returning to Los Angeles from Vancouver. Carl Houser jumps overboard and is presumed drowned. Houser later turns up on shore but with a bullet wound in his body.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS captain returns to the ruins of Dachau and begins reminiscing on the power he enjoyed there, until he finds himself on trial by those who died at his hands.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A group of newspapermen plays a joke on a man who in return decides to get payback.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A serial killer uses the heavy London fog to confuse the police.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Forced to crash land a plane, Mannix gets rescued by an escaped convict who's being pursued by corrupt law enforcement officers out to silence him.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: An illegal immigrant from Mexico has died in a coyote's case. Sheep grower Rita McBain is accused of the deed. Cannon must prove Rita's innocence and deal with a human smuggler ring.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: As a police lieutenant ends up falling for the ex-girlfriend of a murderer in trying to make her a witness to have the murderer convicted, he's framed for the murder of a second witness, so Barnaby and J.R. try to clear him.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's apartment party provides insight into the nature of an officer's private life.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives tackle cases for the department's robbery division.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed wants an early dinner when his wife puts him on a low-cal diet. However, one after another events prevents them from going code 7 all night long. Events include the theft of a man's sod, stolen credit cards and a suspected car theft.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed tries to pawn off his new litter of puppies to co-workers, strangers and even victims. The officers work a silent alarm, rescue a boy with his head stuck in a fence and track down a prowler.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony cheer up Mr. Quzzer by showing lost Time Capsule Tiriva footage. "

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver seems to be on a selfish streak after backing out of a babysitting and later not wanting to do a simple favor for Wally. Ward gives Beaver a stern lecture and he soon takes Ward's advice when a tramp comes to the door wanting some kindness. However, the tramp quickly takes advantage and helps himself to more than a glass of water.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie brags about getting a credit card to his high school friends. When Wally's battery dies on his car, Eddie comes to the rescue by getting him a brand new battery. Everything is fine until Mr. Haskell finds out that Eddie charged it on their charge account.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Impatient Partner
programme.desc: Paint manufacturer Amory Fallon suspects that his partner, Ned Thompson, is behind a mysterious fire and explosion.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.sub-title: The Man Of The Year (s5, ep)
programme.desc: Matlock is all set to be honored as the man of the year, but when his car breaks down and he's forced to ask his housekeeper for a ride, a simple 20-minute trip turns into a flat tire, hostage situation and afternoon in jail.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Lana's ex-boyfriend comes to see her and brings a load of stolen rifles with him.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Mamie Balwin has a cataract, but does not want an operation

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus runs into Jesse Dillard who is wanted for shooting a black man. Festus wants to find out more and takes his friend to prison.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Sam Logan is released from jail after serving his 20-year sentence for stealing $100,000 worth of gold dust. He is followed by a bounty hunter who believes Sam will lead him to where the gold is buried.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshal Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother, he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "After the Sheriff escorts Ben Morrell and his son Terry to the wagon train, the members find Ben Morrell and his son very antisocial: the two can't even tolerate each other. One woman wants to adopt Terry believing he is being mistreated."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: While responding to a call, Roy and John witness a pedestrian being struck by a car. A woman is badly burnt in a fire. John thinks about settling down. A belly dancer overdoses on diet pills. A child bites a dog and the dog bites back. At a burning building, Roy and John must jump to safety.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In the midst of a deluge of patients and their individual medical histories, the 4077th is out of blood. Everyone in camp is donating at 48-hour intervals when a truckload of Turkish soldiers arrives to offer their blood and save the day.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Prompted by pressure from Frank, Hot Lips sets a date for marriage with Lieutenant Colonel Donald Penobscott. When Donald arrives in camp for the wedding, a bridal shower and bachelor party are given. When he has passed out drunk, Hawkeye and B.J. place Donald in a body cast and convince him that he has broken his leg.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Fade Out, Fade In: Part 1 (s6, ep)
programme.desc: Radar gets a temporary replacement for Maj. Burns: a Major Charles Emerson Winchester III. Maj. Winchester arrives at the 4077th, only to painfully discover that he's the permanent replacement Frank Burns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets a temporary replacement for Maj. Burns: a Major Charles Emerson Winchester III. Maj. Winchester arrives at the 4077th, only to painfully discover that he's the permanent replacement Frank Burns.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, the local pharmacist's niece, comes to Mayberry to replace him on a temporary basis. Her "new" approach to dispensing medicine shakes things up in Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy comes to believe that Ellie is a "deadly female hunter" out to marry him so he tries to put her onto other quarry.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly have decided to support the women’s lib movement, since Jethro treats them like servants. Each time Jed tries to make it better, Jethro ends up messing it up and upsetting the women even more. At the bank, the secretaries continue to fight for liberation, but Drysdale has decided to challenge them as well.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer drives Sgt. Carter crazy by liking him, no matter what the sergeant does to make Gomer dislike him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The guys find a new rocket that has landed near camp. They are at a loss on how to get it back to England for study when Marya and her rocket-designing husband enter camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a U.S. general out of Stalag 13, while Klink plans to move the camp's fence line and Gertrude arrives with her fiancé.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Hit, Carol puts a "hit" on her husband, then worries she's in danger being around him. Then, in P.T.A. Auditions, a Russian director must cope with a bad leading lady. Finally, in Daughter of Houdini, a fake magician finds herself trapped in a sinking box.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Long-legged Models
programme.desc: Racketeer George Castle kills Las Vegas hotel owner Glenn Faulkner over a gambling debt and sets his sights on land inherited by Faulkner's daughter, Stephanie. When Castle turns up murdered as well, Stephanie finds herself the number one suspect.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A newcomer refuses to allow his garden to be used for a church activity.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: After years of being teased by her husband, a woman discovers that she looks very similar to movie star and decided to get payback.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to help a girl who witnessed her father's murder and was driven over the edge mentally by the event.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Dr. Simeon is accused by orderly Duran of stealing drugs in the Metropolitan Hospital . Cannon has to find out whether this is right.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby works with a claims adjuster in an arson-and-murder case.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Police and Secret Service undertake maximum security for a Presidential visit to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday clashes with a woman writer gathering research material for an article on policewomen.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A ditzy young woman reports her 1958 Ford convertible stolen while she went into a liquor store. She left the keys in the car, has no paperwork, doesn't know the license number or other details but she needs it by 6 PM for a date. She finally tells the officers that her eight-foot boa constrictor is in the trunk as she was coming from the vet.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Walters and Brinkman are on a roll lately and like to brag, much to the irritation of Reed. He and Malloy help them out by finishing one of their calls, then rescue a sick teenage girl and arrest the young man who took her in. Back on patrol, they meet an informant who gives them a tip on a big drug buy scheduled for 11 PM. They give the info to Sgt. Miller who asks them to help in the bust.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Do you need advice? Bill,Toony, and a special guest comedian are here to help."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver has gotten a job as a caddy and is quickly running around the golf course chasing balls. However, all innocence is broken when one of the guys, Beaver is caddying for cheats in order to win a bet. Soon, Beaver begins wrestling with his conscience over whether or not to tell anyone."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver comes home with the news that he applied to appear on a local television show called 'Teen Forum' and has been accepted. Beaver gets out of classes for the taping and all his classmates are treated to being able to watch him on TV during class. However, what Beaver, his friends and family don't know is that the show tapes each episode a week in advance.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Romantic Rogue
programme.desc: After con man Stacey Chandler and Helen Harvey are married in Vegas, Chandler's former associate and scheming con woman, Irene Wallace, is found murdered.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When one of two business partners planning to hire an arsonist and collect insurance money is found dead, the surviving business man is pinned as the likely killer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Luann moonlights as a singer at a nightclub and finds romance with the clubs owner. Her happiness is short-lived when she realizes that the bartender is dealing drugs.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John thinks about giving up the lumber mill when it seems like everything is going wrong

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Talbot falls in love with Katherine after shooting her husband in self-defense. But when Katherine learns of Talbot's plans to rob a bank, she puts her life in danger by telling him she will leave him if he does.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss hires Waldo as a ranch hand after keeping Waldo from killing himself. Hoss soon learns that Waldo is lousy at his job and only causes problems for everyone else because of his clumsiness. Although Hoss is willing to defend him, he soon discovers a secret about Waldo.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Several men are vying for a rancher's daughter's affections. When she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Bill Hawks returns the horse and belongings of a horse thief he shot to the local town sheriff. These identify the thief as a long dead war hero with a monument in the middle of town who was declared dead after a payroll robbery."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John finally restore their old fire engine to ride in the California Fire Fighters Parade. A man with heart problems causes an accident for which the other driver blames herself. Dr. Early treats a patient who has a seizure in the waiting room. A man on a date passes out and has difficulty breathing. A child's medical condition causes an argument between his divorced parents.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar wants to become a man so Hawkeye recommends he goes to Seoul. On his way there he is hit by a mine. Hawkeye performs surgery on him. After surgery, Hawkeye goes to the Officers Club where he gets hammered. The next day he goes to surgery severely hung over. Radar tells Hawkeye he is disappointed in him. Hawkeye explodes and is then yelled at by Major Houlihan, Colonel Potter and Father Mulcahy.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Madness strikes as B.J. and his old friend, Bardonaro, play a series of practical jokes on each other, just as Bardonaro is about to leave Korea. Hawkeye gets the last laugh. He sends Bardonaro off without his traveling papers, and in a jeep with too little gas.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th, caught up in tension and nerves, creates a bonfire to release their pressure. Meanwhile, Sidney Freedman is depressed over a young soldier who blames him for his injuries, because Freedman had sent him back into combat.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye tries unsuccessfully to get to Seoul, to see Nurse Gilmore for the weekend. Meanwhile, Winchester has taped a letter home, asking for his influential parents to help get him back to the States. To get even, Hawkeye and B.J. switch Winchester's clothes, causing Winchester to alter his eating patterns.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes friends with an eight-year-old runaway.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, trying to lift Barney's spirits, stages a minor robbery and tries to match his deputy with a shy seamstress.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny has heard that Miss Jane has never been proposed to and wants to help out. She tries to get Jed to propose, but has no luck with that plan. Granny then settles to have Jethro propose to her. Jethro asks Miss Jane out, and she accepts. While at the bank, Jethro also meets the gorgeous new night guard, Ilse.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While in town on a pass, Sgt. Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from "The Dragon Lady." But in order for it to work he will need Duke's help.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hogan is identified as a saboteur, he impersonates a German officer in front of the very Gestapo agent who could take him down.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Funny Thing Happened On The Way To London
programme.desc: Winston Chuchill's right-hand man, Group Captain "Robbie" Roberts, is shot down, captured and brought to Stalag 13. The Luftwaffe scheme to assassinate Churchill by keeping Roberts in the cooler while an impostor escapes to England to carry out the job.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Bus Stop, strangers at a bus stop rush to answer the phone, which may be a quiz show. Then, in Brief Encounter, a film parody, Carol and Roddy have a romantic encounter using only one-word responses. Finally, in The Family, Eunice's successful brother returns home.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Gilded Lily
programme.desc: Enid Griffin, the secretary of Stewart Brent, attempts to commit suicide after learning her boss has married. Arthur Binney attempts to blackmail Stewart Brent with facts about his new wife having been in jail for fraud. When Binny turns up dead, Brent is framed for his murder, but confesses to protect his wife.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate soldier wanders into a town and finds a group of Union soldiers frozen in time. An old man with a black book implores the soldier to use the book's powers to win the Civil War.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A taxidermist uses his art to dispose of his brother.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Sam needs the money his father will not give him so his girlfriend can marry him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix becomes the target of a vicious street gang known as the Nomads.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Paul Stubber taps the computer of the railroad company to be able to rob cars with valuable goods. However, nothing can be proved against him. Cannon finds Stubber's weak spot: The crook fights for the right to keep his son.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: In Hawaii, J.R. is framed for murder and thrown in jail by a vengeful cop.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to get citizens to take part in a crime-prevention campaign.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A businessman's war against drug addiction results in a new group whose motto is "freaking out isn't in."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After roll call, Reed and Malloy provide backup at a robbery, help a lost man return home, handle a call about a prowler and respond to a silent alarm. Malloy demonstrates for Reed the importance of "officer presence."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed and Malloy spot TJ, an informant, who tells them about a possible drug house. They spot a woman and girl at the same bus stop an hour apart. When they stop to talk to her, she tries to run.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony flash back to the rad year of 1989, a year of flashy hammer pants, lip-syncing scandals, and the end of an era for a cartoon legend."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward have noticed the Wally has been spending quite a bit of his time at the movie theater but it's not to see the movies. He's been eyeing the pretty young lady who works in the box office. Thanks to Eddie, Wally works up enough courage to ask her out but quickly sees another side to the young lady that is a bit too mature for Wally's taste.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally is let down when he learns that he didn't get the sports scholarship from State University. However, he does learn that Lumpy did get one and this leads him to throw a party in Lumpy's honor. However, half way through the party, Fred calls with some unfortunate news for Lumpy, the scholarship is no longer available due to Lumpy's grades.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Malicious Mariner
programme.desc: During a terrible storm at sea, First Officer Jerry Griffin dumps a million dollars worth of goods overboard to lessen the chances of his cargo freighter sinking. Once on shore, Jerry is hauled before a maritime court.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A young acquaintance of Matlock's asks for his expertise when accused of murder and the theft of a secret formula.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Attorney Virgil Tibbs returns to Sparta and is soon assigned his first case as a defense attorney.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A former boyfriend and dance partner of Rose's comes to visit

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt becomes involved in investigating the disappearance of female settlers and travelers in the region. He links it to a band of renegade Native Americans, who plan to sell the women as sex slaves to a band of ruthless white mercenaries.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An author is inspired to write about the heroic Cartwrights after watching first-hand as they fight off an attempted robbery of a stage. As Ben and Adam see no use for the glory of such a novel, they turn the writer down forcing him to turn to the sheriff.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Shotgun man John Beaumont, who Lucas sent to prison, returns with vengeance on his mind.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon turns to Lucas for protection from his vengeful brothers.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "A Frenchman arouses strong---and polarized---emotions among the wagon train members: men distrust him, women adore him. He owes a substantial gambling debt and plans to pay it off by convincing a woman to pay it until he is killed."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A man is trapped on a film set with a bear. When Roy and John rescue him, they are invited to a "thing" that the man is giving later that week. John talks Roy into getting overdressed for the event. Dr. Brackett treats a man suffering from trichinosis. A bomb blast injures two men. The paramedics resuscitate a musician at the party.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With supplies low, the 4077th gets a truckload of ice cream churns and salt tablets. But what it needs are light bulbs, and in the dimly lit post-op Charles makes an error for which he draws the ultimate wrath of his two surgeon bunkmates. Meanwhile, B.J. receives a mystery novel that everyone in camp reads in turn. The last page is missing and the solution to the mystery is undiscovered until B.J. calls the author by long distance.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye falls in love with Kyong Soon, a Korean woman who is caring for her sick mother and orphaned children. But all hope is lost as Kyong takes her possessions and the children to the south after her mother has died.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Charles plans a scheme to get rich when he discovers that blue scrip is going to be exchanged for red. Hawkeye and B.J. outsmart him, and he is left holding the worthless scrip. Klinger tries to get into West Point so that he can get out of Korea.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar notices a number of tattoos on one of the wounded, and convinces himself that with a tattoo he will be irresistible to women. Everyone tries to discourage him, and he admits to having received a tattoo that will wash off. Meanwhile, Margaret is frustrated with a new nurse who keeps getting upset at the sight of combat injuries.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy becomes upset when Opie contributes a measly three cents to the Underprivileged Children's drive.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy strives to end a long-running feud between two neighboring families.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Troubles are following everyone after the women’s lib movement ended. Elly and Granny return home to the mansion, while Jethro still believes he is Japanese and the women should serve him because women should wait on man. And at the bank, the secretaries are working on better working conditions, but get bullied by Banzai, who is trying to get new girls from Japan.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: It's survival training for the platoon, meaning that for five days partners have to rough it. Thinking Gomer will bring down the rating for the platoon, Sgt. Carter takes Pyle as his own partner.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan becomes the partner of a beautiful underground agent when he and his men team up with the underground to destroy a guided missile battery.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Lieutenant Carter enters the camp and Hogan discovers a spy among his men.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests John Byner And Francine Beers
programme.desc: In The Diner, two robbers pose as cook and waitress when the police interrupt their hold-up at a restaurant. Then, in Carol and Sis, Carol and Harvey's anniversary is ruined by a house guest. Finally, in Humanoids, two female robots compete to see which is better.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lazy Lover
programme.desc: Attempting to miss hitting her stepfather's car, Patricia Faxon swerves as she enters her driveway and hits the hedges. After asking her stepfather, Bertrand Allred, to move his car, he finds Bob Fleetwood badly hurt next to the hedges.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a business man plans to build a dam in Africa, a witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An apparently dying man is offered the first plot at a brand-new cemetery.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Two brothers, one of them a murderer, share a cabin with a woman.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A woman hires Mannix to investigate the disappearance of her husband's plane in the Rockies, but then the detective learns that she is not the missing man's wife.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Frank Cannon is hired to search missing rancher Dale Lucas following his wife's order. He notes that the guard service of the ranch has been replaced.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: In Hawaii, J.R. is framed for murder and thrown in jail by a vengeful cop.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Milner and Kent McCord appear as Officers Malloy and Reed to portray the policeman's role in society.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A conference provokes old-line policemen to reassess their attitudes, particularly toward minority groups.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: The officers have to put with a mystery noise in the car while handling grand theft horse, a naive girl and a robbery suspect who makes fake calls to distract the police

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.sub-title: Log 33 -- It All Happened So Fast
programme.desc: In a behind-the-scenes look at police investigations into deadly force incidents, Reed endures a night of intensive questioning by the station's lieutenant after he kills a man in self-defense.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony trek through the beehive state!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver is all set to go with Eddie and Wally to hook up a AM/FM car radio in Eddie's car but June stops him and insists he go to the grocery store to pick up the items he had promised. This leads Beaver to give June the cold shoulder treatment while playing up to Ward.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward go away for a couple of days and leave Uncle Billy to stay with Wally and Beaver. Beaver quickly realizes Billy runs a much looser ship than Ward and June and feels as if he can get away with more things. However, he's soon in for a rude awakening when he helps Gilbert sneak into the movies.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Crying Comedian
programme.desc: Comic Charlie Hatch learns that the woman he loved and lost, Anne Gilrain, has escaped from a sanitarium to which she was forced to commit herself by her husband, Tom. When Tom Gilrain is murdered, Charlie is afraid that Anne did the deed.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When one of two partners at a law firm is murdered after he is unable to keep a promise to a client, the other attorney is suspected.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba travels to Atlanta to help his nephew after the boy overdoses on drugs. He soon teams up with a street wise cop to take down the drug ring.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy is released from the hospital and returns to Walton's Mountain

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt helps Stella and Marcy escape their bloodthirsty indian captor. After Matt and Stella bring the shaken Marcy out of her shell, the three team together to bring the ringleader of the white slave trade to justice before he can escape to Mexico.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A conman heads into town and takes advantage of the Cartwrights with a fake land deal. He then ends up staying in Virginia city to run an orphanage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race, hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner, who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Flint stops in a saloon with Bill and Charlie where he learns the whereabouts of a man he's been hunting for years---to kill. Bill has to restrain Flint who lapses into recalling his fiancé Nancy Lee Davis and his search for her killer."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A high school classmate of John’s is assigned as Squad 51's new paramedic trainee. The firemen rescue a man trapped in his kitchen after a hydrogen sulfide explosion. The paramedics help treat accident victims at the hospital and tend to child at an amusement park. When an intoxicated man turns out to be a snakebite victim, Roy is hit in the eyes with cobra venom. Back at the amusement park, a heart attack victim is trapped high in the air.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter, deciding that the camp is out of shape, enforces a calisthenics course. When nobody is enjoying it, he makes it fun by splitting the camp into two teams. These teams compete for three day R&R passes. Klinger tries to get out of the army by getting fat.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Victor Bloodworth predicts that 280 wounded will arrive at the 4077th. Hawkeye is antagonized by Bloodworth and shoves him against a wall. Bloodworth presses for a court martial until he becomes one of the wounded and watches Hawkeye saving a soldier's life. Realizing Hawkeye is value as a doctor, Bloodworth drops all charges.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Lost behind enemy lines, Hawkeye and Margaret form a personal truce and seek shelter in a roadside hut."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Margaret and Hawkeye seek solace from enemy fire in each other's arms and end up, briefly, as lovers. "

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie's decision to run for town council sparks a battle of the sexes.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a stranger comes to town, Barney and the people of Mayberry grow suspicious when he seems to know too much about them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly gets a job as a secretary at Mr. Drysdale’s bank to ensure proper treatment of the girls working there. But Granny makes her look like a flapper and teaches her wiggle walking, eye rolling and lap setting. Drysdale throws her out, but after he realizes it is his largest depositor’s daughter, brings her back.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and another boy compete for a job at the grocery store.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The POWs smuggle a tiger tank, about which Klink has been boasting, into camp in order to photograph and study it.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Stalag 13 is named one of the top 10 prison camps in Germany, but it's just a distraction for Hogan and his men to destroy a secret rocket bomb.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Tv Commercials / Friends / Lucky Lady / Old Folks, The
programme.desc: In TV Commercials, Carol and the gang parody classic TV products, including Phyllis' Milk of Magnesia, and Hostel Cupcakes. Then, in Friends, Carol misinterprets a man's kindness as flirting. Next, in Lucky Lady, a poor Carol is pitted against a rich Vicki for the contest title. Finally, in The Old Folks, a grumpy couple waits in line for gas.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Prodigal Parent
programme.desc: When Philip Larkin, the owner of an import-export company, is murdered, his step-father, Joseph Harrison, is charged.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A janitor living in the year 1890 accidentally activates a time traveling helmet, which transports him to 1962—and then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Two travelers carefully watch each other, thinking that the other is a psycho escaped from jail.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A shocking surprise awaits a woman who is about to meet her favorite star.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: On a fishing trip, Mannix has his car break down in the desert. Searching for help he stumbles across the headquarters of a modern day Murder Inc.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Reporter Molly Stoner needs the help of her friend Frank Cannon. The police wants to take her in coercive detention. Molly affirms that infamous gangster Benje Canto has been murdered. Yet her source cannot be revealed.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty's testimony in a trial puts herself in danger and gives her attention from an impressed reporter.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe's entry into the beekeeping business disrupts newlyweds Steve and Betty Jo Elliott.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Steve's Uncle George visits the Shady Rest hotel and lives up to his reputation as a troublemaker.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The city of Beverly Hills is on alert because a cat burglar is on the loose. Elly is worried that this person will steal her cats and kittens, since he is a "cat" burglar. And Jane and Drysdale are worried that the Clampetts will get robbed, since they are prime targets. The cat burglar shows up at the Clampett mansion, posing as a detective to check the place out. Elly shows him the traps she has set. Mike and Bernie, the burglars, decide the caper here will be easy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Granny mistakes an ostrich that Drysdale owns for a giant chicken, which she believes she caused by means of her "growing tonic" made for tomatoes, she tries to shrink it down to size and keep it a secret. She never does succeed in shrinking it back down to normal, so in the end Granny decides to enter this giant bird in the county fair.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Let's Sing With Popeye, Aladdin And His Wonderful Lamp
programme.desc: "Popeye sings his theme song and tells the audience to sing along with him by following the bouncing ball., Olive Oyl works for a movie company writing scripts. In one, she pictures herself as a lovely Princess and Popeye as charming Prince Aladdin."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Much Ado About Mousing, Little Johnny Jet, Switchin' Kitten
programme.desc: "Tom has problems with a dog as he chases Jerry., A B-29 plane has problems finding work in the modern times but his son is a jet and helps out his dad., Tom and Jerry enter an old castle on a dark and stormy night which is owned by a mad scientist."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Roamin' Roman, The Wacky Weed, The Bongo Punch, Well Oiled, The Painter And The Pointer, Kiddie Koncert, Lotsa Luck
programme.desc: "Woody is in Rome and annoying the emperor, so he sends his guard lion to chase him down., Andy buys a flower for his front yard, but it is attacked by a persistant weed., Pepito the Rooster only wants to play the bongos, even though his dad wants him to be a champion fighter., Woody siphons gas from police officer Wally Walrus' car!, Andy tries to paint a portrait of his dog, Butch, but it's difficult for Butch to stand still., Wally conducts a whimsical animal band., Woody and Sugarfoot have terrible luck, which doesn't get better when he finds a four-leaf clover."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Frigid Hare, Sock A Doodle Do, Hare We Go, Dover Boys At Pimento University Or Rivals Of Roquefort Hall, The Foxy Duckling, Blooper Bunny
programme.desc: "Bugs Bunny makes a wrong turn on his way to Miami Beach and ends up at the South Pole, where he runs into some trouble with the natives., Foghorn uses world champion fighter Banty to get back at a farm dog. , Bugs accompanies Christopher Columbus to search for America. , The Dover Boys are the most popular fellows at Pimento University. They are playing hide and seek with Dainty Dora Standpipe when she gets kidnapped. It's up to the Dover Boys to rescue her., An insomniac fox reads a book proclaiming the cure to his problems is to use a pillow with duck down feathers. Anxious to cure his insomnia, he tries to catch a duck but they always seem to be just out of reach. , Bugs Bunny stars in a series of "blooper" outtakes from his own classic cartoons in this modern-day Merrie Melodies episode. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Colonel's Ghost
programme.desc: President Grant wants to go to Gibsonville to dedicate a statue. James West travels ahead to ensure it's safe for the President. He finds Gibsonville now is a ghost town experiencing an "epidemic" of broken necks.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Duke's resemblance to gambler Jason Carter makes him the target for a murderer's bullet when he visits Jason Carter's hometown looking for supplies. Jason has been missing for five years and only one man knows the truth about him."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Jarrod risks inviting his client home for a Christmas visit. She's a young woman accused of aiding and abetting her boyfriend, an outlaw who has recently escaped from jail.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt asks a Russian family to identify three men who killed one of their own, but the family's patriarch is hesitant to trust American justice.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After becoming paralyzed in fear and losing his rifle while hunting a sheep-killing puma, Little Joe's shame and frustration cause him to behave recklessly.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Rose Cornelius and her 10 brothers have fenced off the trail Favor needs to cross to get the herd to water.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Santa Maria, New Mexico is looking for a town marshal. The only man willing is Charley Red Dog, holder of a correspondence school diploma. Paladin allows Charley to take his gun and tries to help.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers hijack the stagecoach Josh is riding with a young prisoner.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Playing The Ponies, A Plumbing We Will Go, Gents Without Cents, Musty Musketeers, Gypped In The Penthouse, Sing A Song Of Six Pants
programme.desc: "A horse is a Stooges, of course, of course. , To escape the police, the Stooges pose as plumbers and are hired to fix a leak in a fancy mansion. They wind up crossing the electrical system with the plumbing and generally ruin the place. One memorable scene has the lady of the house tuning into a television broadcast from Niagara Falls as a torrent of water pours from the set. To escape the wrath of the homeowners the Stooges escape through a magician's trap door. , "The stooges are tailors, and are heavily in debt to the Skin & Flint finance company. When the boys read about the big reward for a fugitive robber, they think it could be the answer to their problems. The bank robber conveniently ducks into their shop and leaves a suit with a safe combination. After his girl friend fails to retrieve it, the robber returns with gang and a wild fight ensues. The boys miss out on the reward but wind up with the crook's bankroll and can pay their creditors. " , The Stooges are three small time actors looking for a job. They meet three girl dancers in the situation and get a small part in a big producers show at the shipyard. When the rest of the cast doesn't show up, the Stooges and the girls must put on the whole show themselves. The show is a hit and the Stooges marry the girls and head to Niagara Falls for their honeymoon. , Set in the middle ages, the Stooges wish to marry their sweethearts, but the King won't give his consent until Princess Alicia gets married. The princess is abducted by Mergatroyd, an evil magician who plans to marry her and become ruler of the country. The Stooges help the princess escape and then defeat the magician and his henchmen in a sword fight , Larry and Shemp reminisce about their experiences with Jean, a diamond crazy gold digger each of them was gypped by. After telling their stories, they have a run in with Moe, who is now married to the same women. When Jean shows up, they deliver some stooge-style revenge. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Prof. Van Helsing is in danger of prosecution for the murder of Dracula...until a hypnotic woman steals the Count's body and cremates it. Bloodless corpses start appearing in London again, and Hungarian countess Marya Zaleska seeks the aid of Jeffrey Garth, psychiatrist, in freeing herself of a mysterious evil influence. The scene changes from foggy London back to that eerie road to the Borgo Pass..."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: After Catwoman steals one of two priceless golden cat statuettes, Batman and Robin race to protect the other. However, Catwoman captures Boy Wonder and sics a tiger on Batman.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.sub-title: For The World Is Hollow And I Have Touched The Sky
programme.desc: While working to deflect an asteroid on a collision course with an inhabited planet, the Enterprise discovers that the asteroid is actually a spaceship with a population unaware of the outside world.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: The ghost of an arsonist tries to take over a renowned conductor's body as his doppelganger.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: After Dr. Smith answers a distress call from an alien space ship, he learns that the aliens need him to operate on their leader. They only problem is that the aliens are actually a race of robots; furthermore, they will all cease to function if their leader perishes.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: An experiment with particles of matter threatens all aboard the Seaview.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: When the Earthlings help a sympathetic Giant puppeteer as his new puppets, the circus owner becomes suspicious and plans to collect the reward for their capture.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In 1836, the travelers find themselves trapped with the defenders of the Alamo.
